name: Sweet Potato Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Cooked sweet potatoes (peeled and chopped or roughly mashed)
recipeInstructions:
1. PLACE the cooked sweet potatoes in a mixing bowl.
2. Add the egg and mix well.
3. Stir in the flour, baking powder, and up to 1/3 cup of milk until the mixture has the consistency of thick, lumpy sauce and can coat a wooden spoon.
4. Gently stir in the melted butter.
5. Heat a non-stick or heavy iron skillet over medium heat on top of the stove.
6. Add about half a teaspoon of butter to the skillet.
7. Spoon 3 tablespoons of batter per pancake into the skillet, ensuring they are evenly spaced.
8. Cook until bubbles rise to the surface of the pancakes and break, approximately 1 to 2 minutes.
9. Using a spatula, carefully flip each pancake and cook for another 2 minutes on the other side.
10. Remove the cooked pancakes from the skillet and keep them warm on a covered plate in an oven or heat-proof dish.
11. Repeat steps 5-10 until all the batter is used.
12. After the first batch is cooked, add as little butter as necessary to prevent sticking without allowing the pancakes to burn.
13. Serve with sour cream. Makes 12 small pancakes.
